text:
<start_of_turn>user
Inter-State Migrant Workers kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Inter-State Migrant Workers (ISMW Act 1979) Inter-State Migrant Workmen (Regulation of Employment) Act ke under aata hai jo 1979 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Migrant Workers par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Protection of migrant workers; displacement allowance. Authority: Labour Commissioner.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Armed Forces ke kya adhikar hain Armed Forces Special Powers Act ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Armed Forces (Special Powers) Act ke tahat Armed Forces ke adhikar: Special powers to armed forces in disturbed areas. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Central Government se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Ayushman Bharat PMJAY under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Ayushman Bharat PMJAY falls under Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PMJAY 2018), enacted in 2018. Status: Active (Expanded 2024). Applies to: Below Poverty Line Families. Key provisions: Health coverage up to Rs 5 lakh per year for poor families. Enforced by: NHA / State Health Agencies.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Specific Relief ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Specific Relief ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Contracting Parties par laagu hota hai. Specific performance of contracts; injunctions. Koi bhi issue hone par Civil Court se sampark karein. Reference: Specific Relief Act - Specific Relief Act.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Whistleblower Protection Rules kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Whistleblower Protection Rules (WBP Rules 2014) Whistle Blowers Protection Rules ke under aata hai jo 2014 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Government Employees par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Confidentiality of complainant; central vigilance officer. Authority: Competent Authority.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
All Travellers ke kya adhikar hain Passport Entry into India ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Passport (Entry into India) Act ke tahat All Travellers ke adhikar: Mandatory passport for entry into India. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Immigration Authority se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Food Safety Act under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Food Safety Act falls under Food Safety and Standards Act (FSSA 2006), enacted in 2006. Status: Active. Applies to: Food Businesses. Key provisions: FSSAI regulations; food safety standards; licensing. Enforced by: FSSAI.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Claim Rejection Rules under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Claim Rejection Rules falls under IRDAI (Protection of Policyholders Interests) Regulations (IRDAI Claim Regulations), enacted in 2017. Status: Active. Applies to: Insurance Claimants. Key provisions: Insurer 30 din mein claim settle kare ya reject kare; reasons likhit mein dene honge. Enforced by: Insurance Ombudsman.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Tax Deducted at Source - Section 194C kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Tax Deducted at Source - Section 194C (Section 194C IT Act) Income Tax Act (TDS on Contractor Payments) ke under aata hai jo 1961 mein enacted hua. Status: Active (Updated 2024). Yeh Deductors par apply hota hai. Key provisions: 1-2% TDS on payments to contractors above Rs 30,000. Authority: Income Tax Department.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Customs Act ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Customs Act ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Importers & Exporters par laagu hota hai. Import/export duties; customs procedures and penalties. Koi bhi issue hone par Customs Authority / CESTAT se sampark karein. Reference: Customs Act 1962 - Customs Act.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Banks & Borrowers ke kya adhikar hain SARFAESI Act ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Securitisation and Reconstruction of Financial Assets Act ke tahat Banks & Borrowers ke adhikar: Banks can recover NPA without court intervention. Kisi bhi problem ke liye DRT / Courts se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Startups & Angel Investors ke kya adhikar hain Angel Tax Exemption ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Income Tax (Angel Tax Exemption for Foreign Investors) ke tahat Startups & Angel Investors ke adhikar: Startups with DPIIT recognition exempt from angel tax; foreign investors included. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Income Tax Department se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Patent Agents ke kya adhikar hain Patent Agent Examination ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
The Patents Rules (Patent Agent) ke tahat Patent Agents ke adhikar: Qualification and examination for patent agents. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Indian Patent Office se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Voters ke kya adhikar hain Voter Verifiable Paper Audit Trail ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Conduct of Elections Rules (VVPAT) ke tahat Voters ke adhikar: Paper trail for electronic voting machines. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Election Commission of India se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Maintenance for Wife During Separation ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Maintenance for Wife During Separation ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Separated Wives par laagu hota hai. Husband employed ho aur wife nahi toh court maintenance order kar sakta hai Rs 25000+. Koi bhi issue hone par Family Court / Magistrate se sampark karein. Reference: Section 144 BNSS - Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Ombudsman Scheme kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Ombudsman Scheme (RBI Integrated Ombudsman 2021) Reserve Bank - Integrated Ombudsman Scheme ke under aata hai jo 2021 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Bank Customers par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Single ombudsman for all RBI regulated entities. Authority: Banking Ombudsman.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is RERA Act under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
RERA Act falls under Real Estate (Regulation and Development) Act (RERA 2016), enacted in 2016. Status: Active. Applies to: Home Buyers. Key provisions: Registration of real estate projects; builder accountability. Enforced by: RERA Authority.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Battery Manufacturers & Importers ke kya adhikar hain Battery Waste Management Rules ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Battery Waste Management Rules ke tahat Battery Manufacturers & Importers ke adhikar: EPR for battery manufacturers; collection and recycling targets. Kisi bhi problem ke liye CPCB / SPCB se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
All Persons ke kya adhikar hain Environment Protection Act ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Environment Protection Act ke tahat All Persons ke adhikar: Umbrella law for environmental protection; MoEF powers. Kisi bhi problem ke liye National Green Tribunal se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is SC & ST Prevention of Atrocities Act under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
SC & ST Prevention of Atrocities Act falls under Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes (Prevention of Atrocities) Act (PoA Act 1989), enacted in 1989. Status: Active (Amended 2018). Applies to: SC/ST Communities. Key provisions: Protection of SC/ST from atrocities; special courts. Enforced by: Special Court.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Background Check Consent ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Background Check Consent ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Job Candidates par laagu hota hai. Employer background check ke liye candidate ki written consent lena zaroori hai. Koi bhi issue hone par Data Protection Board se sampark karein. Reference: DPDP Act 2023 - Digital Personal Data Protection Act.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Hindu Adoption & Maintenance kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Hindu Adoption & Maintenance (HAMA 1956) Hindu Adoptions and Maintenance Act ke under aata hai jo 1956 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Hindus par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Adoption procedures and maintenance obligations for Hindus. Authority: Family Court.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Fake News Regulations kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Fake News Regulations (IT Rules 2023 Amendment) Information Technology (Amendment) Rules 2023 ke under aata hai jo 2023 mein enacted hua. Status: Active (Stayed by HC). Yeh Digital Publishers par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Fact-checking unit for government-related content; PIB FCU. Authority: MIB / PIB.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is UPI Regulation under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
UPI Regulation falls under NPCI UPI Product Circulars and RBI Guidelines (NPCI UPI Circular), enacted in 2016. Status: Active (Updated 2025). Applies to: UPI Users & PSPs. Key provisions: UPI transaction limits; dispute resolution; wallet interoperability. Enforced by: NPCI / RBI.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Prevention of Corruption Act kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Prevention of Corruption Act (PC Act 1988) Prevention of Corruption Act ke under aata hai jo 1988 mein enacted hua. Status: Active (Amended 2018). Yeh Public Servants par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Corruption offences by public servants; prior sanction for prosecution. Authority: Special CBI/ACB Court.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Will Making Checklist ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Will Making Checklist ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh All Adults par laagu hota hai. 2 witnesses ki zaroorat; executor appoint karein; all assets list karein; registered will preferred. Koi bhi issue hone par Sub-Registrar / Probate Court se sampark karein. Reference: Indian Succession Act 1925 - Indian Succession Act.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is IT (Amendment) Rules 2021 under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
IT (Amendment) Rules 2021 falls under Information Technology (Intermediary Guidelines) Rules (IT Rules 2021), enacted in 2021. Status: Active (Amended 2023). Applies to: Social Media & Platforms. Key provisions: Due diligence for intermediaries; Grievance officer mandatory. Enforced by: MeitY / Court.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Bharatiya Sakshya Adhiniyam under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Bharatiya Sakshya Adhiniyam falls under Bharatiya Sakshya Adhiniyam (BSA 2023), enacted in 2023. Status: Active (from Jul 2024). Applies to: All Parties. Key provisions: Replaced Indian Evidence Act; electronic records as primary evidence. Enforced by: All Courts.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Disaster Management Act under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Disaster Management Act falls under Disaster Management Act (DM Act 2005), enacted in 2005. Status: Active. Applies to: All Citizens. Key provisions: NDMA established; disaster preparedness and response. Enforced by: NDMA / SDMA.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Hindus ke kya adhikar hain Hindu Adoption & Maintenance ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Hindu Adoptions and Maintenance Act ke tahat Hindus ke adhikar: Adoption procedures and maintenance obligations for Hindus. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Family Court se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
All Citizens ke kya adhikar hain Disaster Management Act ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Disaster Management Act ke tahat All Citizens ke adhikar: NDMA established; disaster preparedness and response. Kisi bhi problem ke liye NDMA / SDMA se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Representation of People Act kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Representation of People Act (RPA 1951) Representation of the People Act ke under aata hai jo 1951 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Voters & Candidates par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Conduct of elections; eligibility; election disputes. Authority: Election Commission / Courts.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Semiconductor Layout Design ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Semiconductor Layout Design ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Chip Designers par laagu hota hai. Protection of semiconductor layout designs; 10-year term. Koi bhi issue hone par Semiconductor Registry se sampark karein. Reference: SLDI Act 2000 - Semiconductor Integrated Circuits Layout-Design Act.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Startup India ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Startup India ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Startups par laagu hota hai. Tax exemption, funding support, easier compliance for startups. Koi bhi issue hone par DPIIT / Tax Authorities se sampark karein. Reference: DPIIT Startup Policy - Startup India Action Plan & Rules.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
All Persons ke kya adhikar hain Terrorism ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita ke tahat All Persons ke adhikar: Acts threatening unity, integrity and security of India. Kisi bhi problem ke liye NIA / Special Court se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Farmers Rights Act kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Farmers Rights Act (FM(EPR) Act 2001) Protection of Plant Varieties and Farmers' Rights Act ke under aata hai jo 2001 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Farmers & Breeders par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Protection of plant varieties; farmers' rights to save seeds. Authority: PPV&FR Authority.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
NDPS Act kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
NDPS Act (NDPS 1985) Narcotic Drugs and Psychotropic Substances Act ke under aata hai jo 1985 mein enacted hua. Status: Active (Amended 2021). Yeh All Persons par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Drug trafficking offences; death penalty for repeat offenders. Authority: Special NDPS Court.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
E-FIR Provisions kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
E-FIR Provisions (Section 173(1) BNSS) Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita ke under aata hai jo 2023 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Complainants par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Online/electronic FIR registration for certain offences. Authority: Police / E-Portal.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
All Consumers ke kya adhikar hain Consumer Forum Filing Fee ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Consumer Protection (Consumer Disputes Redressal Commissions) Rules ke tahat All Consumers ke adhikar: District forum: free up to Rs 5 lakh; Rs 5-10 lakh: Rs 200; above Rs 10 lakh: Rs 400. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Consumer Commission se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Account Aggregator Framework kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Account Aggregator Framework (RBI AA Framework) Master Direction on Account Aggregator ke under aata hai jo 2021 mein enacted hua. Status: Active (Expanded 2024). Yeh Bank Customers & Financial Entities par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Consent-based sharing of financial data across institutions. Authority: Reserve Bank of India.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Dependents ke kya adhikar hain Maintenance of Wife ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita ke tahat Dependents ke adhikar: Magistrate can order maintenance for wife, children, parents. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Magistrate Court se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe PMAY Scheme ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
PMAY Scheme ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Low-Income Groups par laagu hota hai. Affordable housing subsidy under Credit Linked Subsidy Scheme. Koi bhi issue hone par NHB / State Governments se sampark karein. Reference: PMAY 2015 - Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Kidnapping & Abduction ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Kidnapping & Abduction ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh All Persons par laagu hota hai. Kidnapping from India and lawful guardianship. Koi bhi issue hone par Sessions Court se sampark karein. Reference: Section 137-140 BNS - Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Public Nuisance under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Public Nuisance falls under Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (Section 270-294 BNS), enacted in 2023. Status: Active. Applies to: All Persons. Key provisions: Acts causing nuisance to public health or safety. Enforced by: Magistrate Court.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Traditional Knowledge Digital Library under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Traditional Knowledge Digital Library falls under Traditional Knowledge Digital Library (Defensive publication) (TKDL), enacted in 2001. Status: Active (Ongoing). Applies to: Knowledge Holders. Key provisions: Documentation of traditional knowledge to prevent biopiracy. Enforced by: CSIR / Patent Office.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Advance Tax Provisions kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Advance Tax Provisions (Section 207-219 IT Act) Income Tax Act (Advance Tax) ke under aata hai jo 1961 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh All Taxpayers par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Quarterly advance tax payment schedule for all assessees. Authority: Income Tax Department.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Non-Compete Clause India ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Non-Compete Clause India ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Employees par laagu hota hai. Post-employment non-compete India mein generally enforceable nahi; restraint of trade illegal. Koi bhi issue hone par Civil Court se sampark karein. Reference: Indian Contract Act Section 27 - Indian Contract Act.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Nominee Rights under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Nominee Rights falls under Insurance Act (Insurance Act Section 39), enacted in 1938. Status: Active. Applies to: Policyholders. Key provisions: Nominee ko policy amount milta hai; nominee update karwate rehna zaroori hai. Enforced by: Insurance Company / Courts.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Subletting Without Permission ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Subletting Without Permission ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Tenants par laagu hota hai. Sublet karna tenant ka right nahi; landlord ki written permission zaroor leni hogi. Koi bhi issue hone par Rent Court se sampark karein. Reference: MTA Section 13 - Model Tenancy Act.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Debtors & Creditors ke kya adhikar hain Insolvency & Bankruptcy Code ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code ke tahat Debtors & Creditors ke adhikar: Resolution of insolvency for companies, firms, individuals. Kisi bhi problem ke liye NCLT / DRT se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Designs Act kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Designs Act (Designs Act 2000) Designs Act ke under aata hai jo 2000 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Designers par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Protection of industrial designs; 10+5 year term. Authority: Designs Office.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Large Companies ke kya adhikar hain CSR Requirements ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Companies Act 2013 (CSR Provisions) ke tahat Large Companies ke adhikar: 2% of net profit on CSR activities for eligible companies. Kisi bhi problem ke liye ROC / MCA se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Stamp Act under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Stamp Act falls under Indian Stamp Act (Indian Stamp Act 1899), enacted in 1899. Status: Active. Applies to: All Transacting Parties. Key provisions: Stamp duty on documents, instruments and agreements. Enforced by: Stamp Authority / Court.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Will vs Inheritance ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Will vs Inheritance ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Legal Heirs par laagu hota hai. Will registered honi chahiye; bina will ke property succession law ke hisaab se banti hai. Koi bhi issue hone par Civil Court / Probate Court se sampark karein. Reference: Hindu Succession Act / Indian Succession Act - Hindu Succession Act & Indian Succession Act.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Mental Healthcare Act under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Mental Healthcare Act falls under Mental Healthcare Act (MHC Act 2017), enacted in 2017. Status: Active. Applies to: Persons with Mental Illness. Key provisions: Rights of persons with mental illness; advance directives. Enforced by: Mental Health Review Board.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
UGC Act kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
UGC Act (UGC Act 1956) University Grants Commission Act ke under aata hai jo 1956 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Universities & Colleges par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Coordination and maintenance of standards in higher education. Authority: UGC.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Cable Television Networks Act ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Cable Television Networks Act ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Cable Operators par laagu hota hai. Regulation of cable TV operations; programme and advertisement codes. Koi bhi issue hone par Ministry of I&B se sampark karein. Reference: CTN Act 1995 - Cable Television Networks (Regulation) Act.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Electronic Evidence kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Electronic Evidence (Section 57-63 BSA) Bharatiya Sakshya Adhiniyam ke under aata hai jo 2023 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh All Parties par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Electronic records admissible; Certificate requirement relaxed. Authority: All Courts.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
College Fee Refund Rules kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
College Fee Refund Rules (UGC Notification 2018) UGC (Refund of Fees) Notification ke under aata hai jo 2018 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Students par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Admission cancel karne par 15 din mein fees refund honi chahiye minus Rs 1000 processing fee. Authority: UGC / Consumer Commission.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
All Citizens ke kya adhikar hain Right to Life ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Constitution of India ke tahat All Citizens ke adhikar: No person shall be deprived of life or personal liberty except by procedure established by law. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Supreme Court / High Court se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is GST Annual Return under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
GST Annual Return falls under GST Annual Return Rules (GSTR-9 Rules), enacted in 2017. Status: Active. Applies to: All GST Registrants. Key provisions: Annual reconciliation of GST; GSTR-9 and GSTR-9C. Enforced by: GST Authority.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mortgage Borrowers ke kya adhikar hain Right to Balance Sheet Before Auction ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
SARFAESI Act ke tahat Mortgage Borrowers ke adhikar: Property auction se pehle borrower outstanding amount chuka sakta hai aur property le sakta hai. Kisi bhi problem ke liye DRT se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Ayushman Bharat PMJAY ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Ayushman Bharat PMJAY ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Below Poverty Line Families par laagu hota hai. Health coverage up to Rs 5 lakh per year for poor families. Koi bhi issue hone par NHA / State Health Agencies se sampark karein. Reference: PMJAY 2018 - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Critical Sector Entities ke kya adhikar hain Cybersecurity Framework ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
National Cyber Security Policy and NCIIPC Guidelines ke tahat Critical Sector Entities ke adhikar: Protection of critical information infrastructure; CERT-In reporting. Kisi bhi problem ke liye NCIIPC / CERT-In se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Home Buyers ke kya adhikar hain Builder Delay Compensation ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Real Estate Regulation and Development Act ke tahat Home Buyers ke adhikar: Builder delay kare to buyer ko SBI MCLR rate par interest compensation milega ya refund. Kisi bhi problem ke liye RERA Authority se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Cross Border Mergers under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Cross Border Mergers falls under Companies Act 2013 (Cross Border Merger Rules) (Section 234 Companies Act), enacted in 2017. Status: Active. Applies to: Multinational Companies. Key provisions: Mergers between Indian and foreign companies; RBI/NCLT approval. Enforced by: NCLT / RBI.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
NPA Notice Before Action kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
NPA Notice Before Action (SARFAESI Act Section 13(2)) SARFAESI Act ke under aata hai jo 2002 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Loan Defaulters par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Bank ko 60 days ka notice dena hoga NPA declare karne se pehle action lene ke liye. Authority: DRT / Bank.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
All Workers ke kya adhikar hain Code on Wages ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
